name: hud_ui_element_set_visible
description: HudUiElement::SetVisible toggles the hidden flag and invalidates through the element ftable.
known_limits: VC6 COFF byte verification for hud_ui_element_set_visible currently fails with 23 unmasked mismatches and 7 trimmed NOPs, so Binary-safe remains false.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly and decompilation for 0x404d20 validate visible != 0 clears low-byte flag 0x10, visible == 0 sets low-byte flag 0x10, and both paths indirect-call Invalidate through ftable slot 0x20.
The native smoke verifies ResetCommonFTable, visible SetVisible(1) flag clear plus invalidate-mask propagation, and hidden SetVisible(0) flag set plus invalidate-mask propagation.
